title: cordyline obtecta
intro: Cordyline obtecta is a species of flowering plant in the asparagus family, native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cordyline obtecta include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
